---
title: "nitrix.stats.covariance"
generated: true
signature-hash: 6b4a06c803c28ff9
description: "Empirical covariance / correlation / partial / conditional measures."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-covariance-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-covariance/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.covariance`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Empirical covariance / correlation / partial / conditional measures.

Differentiable, batched (n-D leading batch), JIT-safe.  Supports:

- Unweighted, scalar bias / unbias.
- **Vector weights** (per-observation; the diagonal of $W$).
- **Matrix weights** (full `(obs, obs)` coupling; useful for
  inter-temporal weighting, lagged covariance, etc.).
- Ridge regularisation via the `l2` knob (adds $\lambda I$
  to the estimated covariance).

The weighted mean underlying the matrix-weight path computes
$\mu_i = \sum_t m_t X_{it} / \sum_t m_t$, where the
per-observation marginal weight $m_t$ is the row sum of the
supplied weight matrix.

Functions exposed:

- [`cov`](nitrix-stats-covariance/cov.qmd) / [`corr`](nitrix-stats-covariance/corr.qmd) -- unary covariance / correlation.
- [`pairedcov`](nitrix-stats-covariance/pairedcov.qmd) / [`pairedcorr`](nitrix-stats-covariance/pairedcorr.qmd) -- bivariate (X, Y).
- [`partialcov`](nitrix-stats-covariance/partialcov.qmd) / [`partialcorr`](nitrix-stats-covariance/partialcorr.qmd) -- conditioned on all
  other variables (inverse-covariance-derived).
- [`conditionalcov`](nitrix-stats-covariance/conditionalcov.qmd) / [`conditionalcorr`](nitrix-stats-covariance/conditionalcorr.qmd) -- conditioned on
  an external set of variables (residualise + cov).
- [`precision`](nitrix-stats-covariance/precision.qmd) -- inverse covariance (matrix inverse or
  Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse).
- Aliases: [`ccov`](nitrix-stats-covariance/ccov.qmd), [`ccorr`](nitrix-stats-covariance/ccorr.qmd), [`pcorr`](nitrix-stats-covariance/pcorr.qmd), [`corrcoef`](nitrix-stats-covariance/corrcoef.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-covariance-symbols}
:::
